title: India's first maritime-focused lender eyes $1 billion FY27 fundraise
description: The company aims to disburse ₹8,000 crore to ₹9,000 crore ⁠in loans in the year ending March 2027 and has already sanctioned ₹3,700 crore ‌for two greenfield ports in Andhra Pradesh, taking the total sanctions to ₹11,100 crore so far
